description_long: This object is a mason jar-style glass filled with a light pink milkshake, featuring a sturdy rectangular handle on one side. The jar is topped with two visible garnishes: a large, round chocolate cookie and a rectangular white wafer, both partially inserted into the milkshake. The glass is transparent, allowing the pale pink color of the milkshake to show through, and the handle is seamlessly integrated into the jar's body. The milkshake appears thick and creamy, with the toppings adding a decorative and appetizing touch. The jar has a flat base and straight sides, giving it a robust and classic appearance. No branding or logos are visible on the jar or its contents.
description: A mason jar glass filled with a pale pink milkshake, topped with a chocolate cookie and a white wafer, and featuring a sturdy handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mason jar handle on the right, with both the chocolate cookie and white wafer toppings clearly visible above the milkshake.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and both toppings partially visible, showing the jar's straight back and the flat base.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, highlighting the pale pink milkshake and the two toppings protruding from the top.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view with the handle not visible, showing the back of the jar and the two toppings from a different angle.
